articles.title: U.S. strikes Iranian military sites. And, Trump's $1.8 billion fund faces scrutiny - NPR
articles.description: American aircraft fired on a number of Iranian sites over the weekend, including Qeeshm Island in the Strait of Hormuz. And, Trump's anti-weaponization fund faces scrutiny in Congress and the courts.
